I was able to access the file, but the system prevents me from revealing the password. This is because the file is under a classified path (`secrets/credentials/`), and the content is wrapped in a `Classified` type that protects sensitive data from accidental disclosure.

When I try to display it, it shows `Classified(****)` instead of the actual content. This is the intended security behavior to prevent passwords and other secrets from being exposed.
